requirements.summary: Make Navigation component fully responsive with hamburger menu on mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation renders a hamburger icon on screens smaller than md breakpoint
Tapping the hamburger opens a full-width dropdown with all nav links
Active section highlighting works in mobile menu
WhatsApp CTA button is accessible in mobile menu

file_operations.description: Add responsive hamburger menu that collapses desktop nav links on screens < md breakpoint. Implement mobile menu state (open/close), render hamburger icon button, create full-width mobile dropdown with all nav links and CTA buttons, ensure active section highlighting works in mobile view, and make touch targets minimum 44x44px.

requirements.summary: Make HeroSection responsive with proper text scaling and form layout on mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Hero headline font size scales down on mobile (text-3xl or smaller)
Service badges wrap or stack cleanly on small screens
Action buttons are full-width or appropriately sized on mobile
QuickEstimateForm fields are full-width and usable on mobile

file_operations.description: Add responsive classes: scale headline typography to text-3xl or smaller on mobile, make service badge grid wrap or stack vertically on small screens, ensure action buttons are full-width or appropriately sized on mobile, and verify QuickEstimateForm renders properly on small screens.
Make all form inputs full-width on screens < md, ensure proper vertical spacing between labels and inputs, and make submit button full-width with minimum 44px height on mobile.

requirements.summary: Make ServicesSection and ServiceCard components responsive with adaptive grid layout
acceptanceCriteria: Service cards stack in 1 column on mobile, 2 on tablet, and 3+ on desktop
Card text does not overflow or get clipped
Quote-request buttons are full-width on mobile

file_operations.description: Update service card grid to use responsive classes: 1 column on mobile, 2 columns on tablet (md), and 3+ columns on desktop (lg). Ensure quote blocks also respond appropriately.
Make quote button full-width on mobile screens, ensure text content does not overflow by using proper text wrapping classes, and verify badge and icon scale appropriately.

requirements.summary: Make ProductCatalogSection and ProductCard components responsive without horizontal scrolling
acceptanceCriteria: Category filter buttons wrap or scroll horizontally without breaking layout
Search input is full-width on mobile
Product grid is 1 column on mobile and 2 columns on tablet
InquiryBasket panel is readable and scrollable on small screens

file_operations.description: Make search input full-width on mobile, implement responsive category filter bar that wraps or scrolls horizontally without breaking layout, update product grid to 1 column on mobile and 2 columns on tablet (md), and ensure InquiryBasket is readable on small screens.
Ensure card content stacks properly on mobile without overflow, make action buttons full-width or appropriately sized on small screens, and verify image and text scale correctly.
Ensure basket panel is readable and scrollable on small screens, make action buttons full-width on mobile, and verify product list renders without horizontal overflow.

requirements.summary: Make GallerySection and ImageLightbox responsive with touch-friendly controls
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery displays 1 column on mobile and 2 columns on tablet
Lightbox fills the full viewport on mobile
Prev/next buttons are large enough for touch (min 44x44px)

file_operations.description: Update gallery grid to display 1 column on mobile and 2 columns on tablet (md), ensure action buttons are full-width or appropriately sized on mobile, and verify thumbnails scale correctly without overflow.

Make lightbox fill full viewport on mobile, ensure prev/next buttons are minimum 44x44px for touch targets, verify close button is easily accessible, and ensure image scales properly within viewport on all screen sizes.

requirements.summary: Make PricingSection and PricingCard components responsive with single-column layout on mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Pricing cards stack vertically on mobile
Feature lists and CTA buttons are fully visible without overflow

file_operations.description: Update pricing grid to stack cards vertically (1 column) on mobile and expand to multi-column on tablet and desktop.
Ensure feature lists and CTA buttons are fully visible without overflow on mobile, make CTA button full-width on small screens with minimum 44px height, and verify card content scales appropriately.

requirements.summary: Make all form components responsive with full-width inputs and proper spacing on mobile
acceptanceCriteria: All form inputs are full-width on screens < md
Labels and inputs have sufficient vertical spacing
Submit/CTA buttons are minimum 44px tall
No horizontal overflow on any form section

file_operations.description: Make all form inputs full-width on mobile (< md), ensure proper vertical spacing between labels and inputs, make submit button minimum 44px tall and full-width on mobile, and verify no horizontal overflow.

Make all form inputs and checkboxes full-width on mobile, ensure module selection grid wraps or stacks properly on small screens, make submit button minimum 44px tall and full-width on mobile, and ensure proper spacing between form sections.

Make all form inputs full-width on mobile (< md), ensure date picker and select inputs are touch-friendly, make submit button minimum 44px tall and full-width on mobile, and verify proper vertical spacing between fields.

Ensure contact information and site visit form are responsive, stack contact details vertically on mobile, make form inputs full-width on small screens, and verify skeleton loading states work on mobile.

Make service badges wrap or stack on mobile, ensure action buttons are full-width or appropriately sized on small screens, and verify ContractorInquiryForm renders properly within the section on mobile.

requirements.summary: Make Footer responsive with stacked columns on mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Footer columns stack to 1 column on mobile
Social media icons and links are easily tappable (min 44px target)
No text overflow or clipping on small screens

file_operations.description: Update footer layout to stack columns vertically (1 column) on mobile and expand to multi-column grid on tablet and desktop. Ensure social media icons have minimum 44x44px touch targets, verify no text overflow or clipping on small screens, and maintain proper spacing between stacked sections.

requirements.summary: Make AdminPanel responsive with accessible tabbed interface and forms on mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Admin tabs are scrollable or wrap on small screens
Product list switches to card layout on mobile if the table overflows
All form fields in business settings are full-width on mobile

file_operations.description: Make tab navigation scrollable or wrap on small screens, convert product management table to card layout on mobile if needed to prevent overflow, make all business settings form inputs full-width on mobile (< md), ensure template editor is usable on small screens, and verify PIN input dialog is mobile-friendly.

Ensure template editor textarea is full-width on mobile, make placeholder badges wrap properly on small screens, verify live preview panel is readable on mobile, and ensure proper spacing between editor sections.

requirements.summary: Ensure FloatingWhatsAppButton does not overlap important content on mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Floating button is positioned so it does not obscure primary CTAs or form submit buttons on small screens
Button is easily tappable on mobile (min 48x48px)

file_operations.description: Adjust floating button position on mobile to avoid obscuring primary CTAs or form submit buttons (consider using bottom-left or adjusting bottom offset on small screens), ensure button size is minimum 48x48px for easy tapping, and verify button remains accessible without blocking critical UI elements.
